description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, painted in olive drab green with white stenciled markings, including a prominent white star on the hood. The vehicle features a canvas roof and partially open sides, with two front seats and a rear bench seat visible. The front grille is vertical and slatted, flanked by round headlights, and the windshield is upright and split. The SUV has rugged, all-terrain tires with a spare mounted on the rear, and the rear section is covered by a canvas top with a small window. The doors are minimal or absent, emphasizing easy access, and the interior appears basic with utilitarian controls and seating. The overall appearance suggests a classic World War II-era Willys Jeep, designed for durability and off-road capability.
description: A military-style olive drab SUV with a canvas roof, white star markings, rugged tires, and a utilitarian open-sided design reminiscent of a classic Willys Jeep.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical slatted grille, round headlights, split windshield, and white star on the hood.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the canvas roof, open sides, minimal doors, and visible seating arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire, canvas rear cover with a small window, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open cabin, rear bench seat, and additional stenciled markings.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black steel wheels with simple circular holes and rugged off-road tires
